title: Order relative to authorizing the joint committee on Labor and Workforce Development to make an investigation and study of a certain current Senate document relative to wage theft and due process.

abstracts.abstract: Senate, December 11, 2025 -- The committee on Labor and Workforce Development, to whom was referred the petitions (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 1377) of Bruce E. Tarr for legislation relative to wage theft and due process, report the accompanying Order  (Senate, No. 2843).

actions.description: Reported from the committee on Labor and Workforce Development
Order reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

related_entities.name: committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently
the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

actions.description: Discharged to the committee on Senate Rules
